system.flavor: You stand ready to step in at the slightest mistake in stance.
system.effect:
Effect may clear a negative status on yourself. Then gain the following interrupt until the start of your next turn.

Correction
Interrupt 1, range 1-3
Trigger ally in range is attacked.
Effect [X]: The attack gains [-]. Then, after the attack resolves, swap places with your ally and you may push both them and the attacking foe 1 (4+) or 2 spaces.
Impact takes damage equal to the spaces they moved before impact (max 6).
